item.title: Swan Signal Live - A Bitcoin Show – Bitcoin is Winning the Debasement Trade. Quietly.
item.description:
• JPMorgan analysts say Bitcoin may be replacing gold in the debasement trade as Bitcoin ETF flows strengthen while gold ETF demand weakens
  • China continues accumulating gold aggressively, reinforcing the broader de-dollarization theme
  • Brady and Brandon discuss rumors of renewed U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve momentum and possible announcements this summer
  • Michael Saylor signals Strategy may sell small amounts of Bitcoin when useful, not as a retreat, but as financial flexibility around preferred equity products like STRC
  • AI-related stocks are driving a large share of market gains, with discussion of whether AI is a bubble or a durable infrastructure boom
  • The hosts compare AI adoption to the early internet, noting that today’s AI demand is already much more visible and useful
  • Bitcoin’s recent higher-low pattern suggests the market may have already passed its local bottom
  • Brady and Brandon emphasize self-custody, highlighting Swan Vault as a safer, guided path for Bitcoin holders
  • Brandon shares research on Bitcoiner personality types, showing Bitcoiners heavily over-index as intuitive, analytical, independent thinkers
  • The episode closes with a discussion of Vigil Protocol, Swan’s new AI-assisted platform for organizing legal, financial, and estate-planning documents

item.title: What Bitcoin Did – Jack Mallers | Wall Street Is Rebuilding Around Bitcoin
item.description:
“Bitcoin can change the world because the world can’t change Bitcoin.”

Jack Mallers is back on the show to break down his vision for 21, Strike, and the next phase of Bitcoin’s monetisation.

Jack explains why he doesn’t want to build another pure Bitcoin treasury company or another crypto casino, but a full-stack Bitcoin business: financial services, lending, custody, infrastructure, mining, capital markets, and a balance sheet built around Bitcoin. We get into the proposed acquisition of Strike, Bitcoin-backed lending, proof of reserves, why profitability matters, and why he thinks the best Bitcoin company won’t simply be the one that owns the most Bitcoin.

We also discuss where Bitcoin fits in a world moving towards war, inflation, energy shocks, multipolarity, and whether fiat can survive another crisis.

THANKS TO OUR SPONSORS:

ANCHORWATCH

BLOCKWARE

LEDN

BITKEY

SWAN

CAPE

FOLLOW:

Danny Knowles: https://x.com/_DannyKnowles or https://primal.net/danny

Jack Mallers: https://x.com/jackmallers

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Frontier – Inside Wall Street’s bitcoin playbook with Denny Galindo
item.description:
Denny is a wealth manager and bitcoin research lead at Morgan Stanley, where he bridges traditional finance and bitcoin for high-net-worth investors. He operates inside one of the world’s largest financial institutions while developing frameworks to help advisors understand and allocate to bitcoin.

In this episode, Denny joins The Bitcoin Frontier to share how investors should think about bitcoin in a portfolio, the three core investor buckets driving adoption, and his thoughts on determining whether you’re underweight or overweight bitcoin. We dig into bitcoin’s market cycles and seasonal framework, the role of global money supply in driving returns, and practical strategies for gaining exposure in a volatile asset.

SUPPORT THE PODCAST:
 → Subscribe
 → Leave a review
 → Share the show with your friends and family
 → Send us an email: podcast@unchained.com
 → Learn more about Unchained: https://unchained.com/?utm_source=you...
→ Book a free call with a bitcoin expert: https://unchained.com/consultation?ut...

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 – Intro & Denny’s role bridging traditional finance and bitcoin
2:00 – From equity research to leading bitcoin insights at Morgan Stanley
4:20 – The three investor buckets: digital gold, venture, and diversifier
7:30 – How institutions evaluate volatility and correlation
10:50 – Where bitcoin fits in portfolios today (risk asset vs store of value)
14:00 – How to determine if you’re underweight or overweight bitcoin
18:00 – Why most investors are still early (0–4% allocation range)
21:40 – Will the three investor frameworks converge over time?
23:10 – Bitcoin cycles: macro liquidity vs halving-driven supply shocks
26:30 – Using cycles for rebalancing vs long-term holding strategies
31:20 – Tail risks: quantum computing and “earthquake” scenarios
36:10 – Bitcoin as a global store of value and M2-driven returns
41:10 – Modeling long-term returns: monetary expansion + adoption
48:30 – How to build a position: dollar-cost averaging and timing
52:15 – Seasons of bitcoin: winter, spring, and portfolio adjustments
55:00 – What it takes for bitcoin to become a standard portfolio allocation

WHERE TO FOLLOW US:
→ Unchained X: https://x.com/unchained
→ Unchained LinkedIn:   / unchainedcom 
→ Unchained Newsletter: https://unchained.com/newsletter
→ Denny Galindo’s Twitter: https://x.com/DennyGalindo 
→ Timot Lamarre’s Twitter: https://x.com/TimotLamarre 


]]>

item.title: Once Bitten! A Bitcoin Podcast. – What's Happening With Bitcoin In India? - Santosh V - #608
item.description:
Were you under the impression Bitcoin was being suppressed in India?

$ BTC 80,725

Block Height 948,748

This episode of the Once Bitten Podcast features Santosh V, Founder of Indias first Bitcoin accelerator programme and co-founder of Travel With Bitcoin.

Santosh discusses his profound journey into Bitcoin including stories of setting up a Bitcoin-only juice shop in Uganda, launching an accelerator program for Bitcoin entrepreneurs in India, and plans for an upcoming Bitcoin conference in Mumbai.

Key Topics:

  • Santosh's personal Bitcoin journey and early evangelism
  • Travel With Bitcoin's sabbatical in Africa and encountering Bitcoin adoption
  • Establishing "Juicy B," a Bitcoin-only juice shop in Uganda
  • The legal status and entrepreneurial landscape of Bitcoin in India
  • The India Bitcoin Accelerator program and its innovative projects
  • Vision for Bitcoin innovation in India and the Global South
  • Plans for the "Bitcoin Mela" conference in Mumbai
  • Challenges and considerations for Bitcoin startups and VC funding

item.title: The Mustard Seed Bitcoin Podcast – Coffeezilla vs 11%+ Digital Credit Yields and Why Bitcoin is Ready To Run | Joe Consorti
item.description:
Bitcoin is evolving into a unique asset that responds to both crisis and liquidity expansion. In this conversation, we break down how macro policy, market structure, and institutional flows are reshaping bitcoin’s role in global portfolios. The result is a shift toward bitcoin as a core asset for long-term capital allocation.


Timestamps:

0:00 Introduction and current bitcoin market setup

0:23 Price levels, resistance, and defining a new bull market

1:30 Macro backdrop: war, uncertainty, and market reactions

2:40 Bitcoin as chaos insurance across global crises

4:00 Performance vs gold, S&P 500, and shifting perception

5:00 Liquidity asset vs risk-off asset: reconciling the paradox

6:30 Dual drivers: global liquidity and crisis demand

8:00 Declining volatility and shallower bitcoin drawdowns

9:30 Why traditional markets avoid prolonged recessions

12:00 Debt dynamics and the inevitability of policy response

14:00 Faster Fed response cycles from 2008 to today

16:00 The “big print” and bitcoin as the primary beneficiary

17:30 Role of technology and information flow in policy decisions

20:00 Monetary policy, asset inflation, and wealth concentration

21:30 Fastest stock market rally since 1982 and implications

23:30 V-shaped recoveries and forward market returns

25:00 Institutional positioning and bullish equity signals

27:00 Treasury market stress and liquidity risks

28:30 Why markets rise in both good and bad scenarios

30:00 Bitcoin’s origin and alignment with monetary debasement

31:30 Coffeezilla debate and digital credit misconceptions

35:00 STRC mechanics and sustainability of yield

40:00 Bitcoin balance sheet coverage and risk framing

43:30 Bitcoin decoupling from tech and software stocks

46:00 Long-term path toward an uncorrelated asset

46:30 What to own if bitcoin did not exist

48:30 Closing thoughts and where to follow

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Broadcast – The Hodl Report | Saylor Selling? | Clarity ACT | Live Sessnion W/ Vince and Joel
item.description:
Most Bitcoiners overlook the biggest threat to your wealth: systemic money devaluation masked as "inflation." In this episode, Vince and Joel dive deep into the hidden mechanics of government-induced theft—calling it what it truly is—money being stolen from your time and effort. Discover how central banks’ relentless printing sprees are shaping a world on the brink of divergence: some regions headed toward socialism and authoritarianism, others striving for true financial sovereignty through Bitcoin.You'll learn why the narratives around inflation are just the surface—underneath lies an ongoing attack on your savings, and only Bitcoin stands as a safeguard against this systemic theft. We break down the importance of asking tough questions about control, accountability, and the real purpose of taxes, exploring how the current system disincentivizes earning and innovation while fueling wealth gaps. See how Bitcoin’s deflationary model offers hope, but only if you actively understand and participate in its adoption, rather than passively following mainstream narratives.This episode also explores intriguing discussions on the future of Bitcoin pricing—whether a hyperparabolic run is imminent if institutions and governments begin stacking heavily—and the importance of skepticism toward influential figures in the space like Saylor and others. With insights into regulatory risks like the Clarity Act, and the psychological barriers caused by complacency and misinformation, you’ll walk away with a sharper perspective on why understanding Bitcoin today isn’t just smart—it's essential for your financial survival.

Joel's X Account: https://x.com/JoelHodlman

Vince's X Account: https://x.com/HodlFlorida

YouTube:  ⁨@TheBTCBroadcast⁩ 

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thebitcoinbroadcast/

Sponsors:Protect Your Seed Phrase with MicroSeed: https://microseed.io/?ref=TBBUse Code "TBB" for 5% off your MicroSeedBitcoin Well: https://bitcoinwell.com/referral/vincehunt

#bitcoin #btc #business #podcast #Liveshow

For entertainment Purposes Only. Not Financial Advice.

]]>

item.title: Unchained – Uneasy Money: Who Owns Stolen Crypto? The $71M Fight Testing DeFi Limits
item.description:
A legal battle over frozen KelpDAO hack funds is forcing DeFi to answer questions it has long avoided.


Thank you to our sponsors!⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠


Coinbase One: Get 20% off the first year of your Coinbase One annual plan at coinbase.com/unchained.


Multichain Advisors: Get help navigating TGEs, go‑to‑market, BD and partnerships, capital markets advisory, PR, media placements, KOL activations and more at multichainadv.com.


When the Arbitrum Security Council froze $71 million in funds tied to the KelpDAO  hack, it was hailed as vigilante justice. Now lawyers representing families of North Korea's victims are claiming that same money in a New York federal courtroom, as if theft transfers title. 

Meanwhile, an AI agent running on Base got robbed via a prompt injection hidden in Morse code, and Coinbase cited artificial intelligence when announcing 14% layoffs. 

Kain Warwick, Taylor Monahan, Luca Netz, and Kelsie Nabben, author of Decentralised Digital Security, work through what DeFi's security layer actually is, who gets to decide when to act, and whether any of it survives the arrival of autonomous agents.


Hosts:

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Kain Warwick⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, Founder of Infinex and Synthetix

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Taylor Monahan⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, Security Expert

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Luca Netz⁠⁠⁠, CEO of Pudgy Penguins

Guest:

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Kelsie Nabben, Research Fellow at RMIT University — Author of 'Decentralized Digital Security: Code, Community, Crisis' (2025)

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Today Recast – Bitcoin Today 5/8/26 Free Samourai
item.description:
🚨 Bitcoin Today — Live X Space 🚨

Cut through the noise with real conversations on Bitcoin, markets, policy, and culture — live and unfiltered.

Today’s Space was fully dedicated to the Free Samourai movement. Hosted by Puncher, we explored the principles of sovereignty, freedom, and decentralized resistance in a world of increasing control. Joined by an incredible lineup of guests including Lauren (Keonne’s wife), Jeff Booth, and Lawrence Lepard, the conversation dove deep into what it means to live as a Free Samourai — mindset, action, financial independence, and building parallel systems that can’t be censored or confiscated.

As always, the discussion stayed open, raw, and full of real-time ideas from free thinkers pushing the edge.

⚠️ Important: Nothing discussed in this Space constitutes financial, tax, or investment advice. No one is being encouraged to buy stocks, ETFs, or any other asset just bitcoin. This is an open forum for ideas, analysis, and brainstorming. Do your own research and make decisions with your family’s best interests as the priority.

🗓️ Monday–Friday ⏰ 8:30 AM PST 👀 Follow @LorenHodl for the bat-signal 🗣️ Jump into the Space — listeners and speakers welcome

Missed it live? 🎧 Every Space is uploaded to your favorite podcast apps. Just search Bitcoin Today Recast.

Follow @BitcoinToday__ on X for a full episode list.

Stack sats. Stay sovereign.


]]>

item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach – From Canada to El Salvador: Escaping Communism & Financial Surveillance For Bitcoin Country
item.description:
George McBride (@georgemcbride_ ) and SatStreet facilitate Bitcoin OTC trading and asset management for family offices moving to El Salvador’s Bitcoin legal tender economy.

Is your home country a fortress for your wealth, or is it a high-tax cage waiting to be locked by the legacy regime? George McBride from SatStreet joins the show to discuss why his family decided to exit Canada and go all-in on El Salvador. We dive into the "Flag in the Sand" moment when President Bukele declared Bitcoin as legal tender, signaling to the world that this jurisdiction is the only true sanctuary for those seeking absolute financial sovereignty.

For the family office or high-net-worth Bitcoiner, the biggest hurdle to exiting the fiat system has always been the friction of legacy banking. George explains how SatStreet provides the deep liquidity and white-glove otc trading services needed to move $50k to $100M+ into the country without the typical delays. If you are looking to acquire beachfront property or shift your asset management strategy to a pro-Bitcoin jurisdiction, having a partner who understands the local banking rails is the difference between a smooth transition and a compliance nightmare.

We also explore why foreign investment is currently flooding into the region, moving beyond just retail hype into institutional adoption. George breaks down how the country’s digital assets regulatory framework is outperforming the restrictive attitude of Western regulators. By building infrastructure and professionalizing the space, builders are proving that El Salvador is no longer an experiment but a global leader in capital efficiency.

The conversation gets practical for those planning their own exit strategy, specifically regarding the Land Cruiser problem. While the country is a pioneer, many local sellers still operate in the dark ages and demand dollars. George details how SatStreet acts as the bridge, allowing you to use your Bitcoin for large purchases like vehicles or land while the seller receives the fiat they are accustomed to. It is the necessary bridge to hyperbitcoinization that allows you to live the lifestyle today.

Finally, George shares details of his hour-long meeting with President Bukele and why the self-filtering mechanism of this country is its greatest strength. El Salvador is looking for the entrepreneurs and builders who are fed up with the status quo. If you are ready to stop being a spectator and start contributing to the most important economic shift in a generation, this episode is your roadmap for making the move.

—Bitcoin Beach Team



Connect and Learn more about George McBride
X: https://x.com/georgemcbride_
X (SatStreet SV): https://x.com/SatstreetSV
X: (SatStreet, Parent Company): https://x.com/Satstreet
Web: https://www.satstreet.sv/

Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com

Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
00:00 Intro
01:59 How to exit Canada and move your family to El Salvador in 2026?
09:39 How does a Bitcoin OTC desk facilitate institutional liquidity for expats?
15:35 How to move large Bitcoin amounts into El Salvador banks without rejections?
19:14 Why are El Salvador’s wealthiest families finally adopting a Bitcoin standard?
22:30 Is El Salvador the world’s best investor paradise for Bitcoiners in 2026?
28:30 Can you buy a Toyota Land Cruiser with Bitcoin in El Salvador today?
31:25 How does the new Bitcoin real estate escrow work for foreign buyers?
35:04 Why is El Salvador’s DASP framework better for Bitcoin businesses than the West?
46:00 What is the insider truth about President Bukele’s Bitcoin strategy

Live From Bitcoin Beach

]]>

item.title: Blockspace: AI & Bitcoin – IREN’s Nvidia Partnership and 5 GW Plan, Hut 8’s $9.7B Hyperscaler Deal, Strategy May Sell BTC to Own the Short Sellers
item.description:
Welcome back to The Blockspace Podcast! Charlie and Colin cover a flurry of deals and quarterly earnings in the bitcoin miner-AI space. We break down IREN’s roadmap to 5 GW and their new Nvidia partnership, Hut 8’s $9.8B contract with an undisclosed hyperscaler, and Cipher Digital coming out with its 3rd AI data center deal but with undisclosed details. We also sit down with Lygos’ COO Francis Corvino to address the news that Strategy may sell bitcoin in the future and review Luxor’s April hashrate lookback series with Kaan Farahani. Plus, quarterly results from $IREN, $HUT, $WULF, $CORZ, and $CIFR.

👉CleanSpark (Nasdaq: CLSK), a market-leading data center developer with a proven track record of success.

👉Luxor, Blockspace's preferred mining pool. Start hashing today with Luxor!

👉Lygos Finance, Borrow against your Bitcoin, without compromising on custody.

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Way Podcast – The EU Just Declared WAR on Your Wealth!
item.description:
Interested in a Plan B? Download our FREE Panama Residency Guide here: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/guides/panama?utm_campaign=planb&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain&utm_content=banter

Schedule a FREE call: http://www.thebitcoinway.com/contact?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain&utm_term=bitcoin-banter

Subscribe to our newsletter: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/resources/newsletter?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

Learn about our self-custody services:

https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/bitcoin-self-custody-training?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

Subscribe to the Newsletter: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/resources/newsletter?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

In this episode of Bitcoin Banter, Michael, Tony and guest Adam Simecka discuss the EU’s latest research into wealth and exit taxes, demonstrating that they plan to tighten the screws on citizens who want to get their wealth out of Europe.

They also talk about the Netherlands’ plans to tax unrealized capital gains set to go ahead in 2028, Saylor’s recent comments that Strategy will sell some Bitcoin to ‘inoculate the market’, the US debt-to-GDP ratio reaching all-time highs since WWII, Fort Knox reportedly packed with impure gold unfit for international transactions, and of course our Donkey of the Week - Peter Schiff, who is telling Bitcoiners they paid ‘too much’ for their Bitcoin!

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS:

00:00 - Recap

00:28 - EU Releases Study on Wealth and Exit Taxation

06:20 - Netherlands to Proceed With Tax on Unrealized Capital Gains

12:49 - Saylor Says Strategy May Sell Some Bitcoin

18:56 - US Debt Surpasses GDP

23:25 - Fort Knox Gold Found to be Impure

26:42 - Donkey of The Week - Peter Schiff Says Bitcoin Is Too Expensive

🎧 LISTEN TO OUR POD & OTHER EPISODES:

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TheBitcoinWay

Rumble: https://rumble.com/user/thebitcoinway

RSS: https://feeds.buzzsprout.com/2334006.rss

🎙ABOUT OUR SHOW:

On Bitcoin Banter, Michael and members of The Bitcoin Way team discuss current events related to Bitcoin, macroeconomics, finance, politics, and more.

Follow Michael on: https://x.com/theothermjordan

Follow Tony on: https://x.com/V4BTC

Follow Adam on: https://x.com/adamsimecka

item.title: Bitcoin Takeover Podcast – S17 E23: Hunter Beast & Mark Karpelès on Bitcoin's Quantum Upgrade
item.description: <![CDATA[Hunter Beast is the author of BIP360, the most popular proposal to add quantum resistant signatures to Bitcoin. Mark Karpelès is the former CEO of Mt. Gox and the creator of Tiban wallet. In this episode, they talk about the looming quantum threat.]]>

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell – James Sexton: World's Top Divorce Lawyer on Money in Relationships and Why 71% of Marriages Fail
item.description:
James Sexton is the world's most famous divorce attorney — 26 years, thousands of cases, and clients ranging from billionaires to celebrities. His verdict? Money isn't what breaks marriages. It's disconnection. James and Natalie discuss:

  • Why 71% of marriages fail, and why money is a symptom, not the cause
  • What billionaire divorces reveal about wealth & happiness
  • How Bitcoin and crypto are dealt with in divorce proceedings (you won't believe one of his stories)
  • The truth about prenups, financial compatibility, and why "enough" is the only number that matters
  • The free daily practice James says could save more marriages

Follow James Sexton on X https://x.com/nycdivorcelaw and on YouTube at https://www.youtube.com/@sextonshow

----

Earn passive Bitcoin income with industry-leading uptime, renewable energy, ideal climate, expert support, and one month of free hosting when you join Abundant Mines at https://www.abundantmines.com/natalie

----

  • Master your Bitcoin self-custody with 1-on-1 help and gain peace of mind with the help of The Bitcoin Way: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/natalie

item.title: True Crime Bitcoin Podcast – 5-Euro-Schraubenschlüssel-Attacke Episode 4
item.description:
Neben all der Sicherheit, die Bitcoin durch Kryptografie, Dezentralität und Proof-of-Work bietet, bleibt der Mensch der größte Risikofaktor, sobald es zur Anwendung von Gewalt kommt. Kein Algorithmus der Welt kann gegen eine Waffe oder ein Messer schützen – zumindest nicht, wenn dadurch die Herausgabe eines Private Keys erzwungen werden soll.

Gemeinsam schauen wir uns an, wie dieses Szenario in den letzten Jahren zugenommen hat und welche spektakulären Fälle sich in verschiedenen Teilen der Welt auf der Jagd nach Bitcoin-Haltern bereits zugetragen haben. Aber ist das wirklich ein Grund zur Panik? Wir versuchen, die Grenze zwischen berechtigter Vorsicht und unnötiger Hysterie zu ziehen.

V4V:
crime21@getalby.com

Nostr:
npub14cz50cvahflq8kpe57qxnnvgmveyng6l8fdtessdqm8ht9fcly3qjd20ry

X:
https://x.com/Muenzcrime

E-Mail:
muenzcrime@tuta.io

Links zur Folge: 
https://xkcd.com/538/ 
https://github.com/jlopp/physical-bitcoin-attacks 
https://www.ledger.com/academy/glossary/wrench-attack 
https://www.htx.com.ec/news/violent-attacks-on-crypto-holders-escalate-worldwide-data-sh-PKYnf2kM/ 
https://www.chainalysis.com/blog/2025-crypto-crime-mid-year-update/ 
https://x.com/lopp/status/2041493693748875713 
https://archive.ph/ZRRMl 
https://newsbit.de/schwedische-bitcoin-nutzer-im-visier-bewaffneter-krimineller/ 
https://edition.cnn.com/2025/05/04/europe/crypto-entrepreneur-finger-severed-intl-latam 
https://gizmodo.com/french-tax-agent-allegedly-sold-personal-data-of-crypto-users-to-criminals-2000707279 
https://www.blocktrainer.de/blog/brutales-gewaltverbrechen-zeigt-wachsende-gefahr-fuer-krypto-besitzer#c22336]]>

item.title: Bitcoin And | Bitcoin & Economic News – Lagarde En Garde | Bitcoin News
item.description:
Bitcoin news and economic news update. Today I cover Christine Lagarde’s warning on euro-denominated stablecoins, the IMF’s concern that AI could increase cyber risk in the financial system, AI agents as possible crypto users, Block’s bitcoin-related quarterly loss, stronger-than-expected U.S. jobs data, Stratum V2 mining adoption, GameStop’s eBay bid, and the rise in crypto wrench attacks. This one touches bitcoin technology, financial news, macro news, and the very strange place where AI, payments, and crime all start sharing a conference room. 
Topics for today: 
  •  Lagarde warns on euro stablecoins 
  •  IMF flags AI cyber risk 
  •  AI agents and crypto payments 
  •  Block raises guidance after Q1 
  •  U.S. jobs beat expectations 
  •  Stratum V2 mining push 
  •  Canvas breach and data risk 
  •  GameStop’s eBay credit wall 
  •  Bitcoin and corporate strategy 
  •  Europe’s crypto wrench attacks 

Today's Articles covering bitcoin news, economic news, AI, and financial security:
 
https://www.theblock.co/post/400548/ecbs-lagarde-flags-euro-denominated-stablecoins-as-financial-stability-risk-diverging-from-bundesbank-stance

https://decrypt.co/367178/imf-warns-ai-supercharge-cyberattacks-global-financial-system

https://atlas21.com/block-inc-guidance-raised-after-solid-q1-173-million-bitcoin-loss/

https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/05/07/u-s-added-115k-jobs-in-april-nearly-doubling-expectations

https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/antpool-block-inc-f2pool-foundry-spiderpool-dmnd-join-stratum-v2-working-group

https://www.nytimes.com/2026/05/07/education/canvas-hacked-down-data-breach.html

https://atlas21.com/gamestop-56-billion-bid-for-ebay-hits-credit-wall/

https://bitcoinmagazine.com/bitcoin-for-corporations/ebay-ignore-gamestop-bitcoin

https://cointelegraph.com/news/europe-crypto-wrench-attacks-losses-101m-certik-report

item.title: einemillionsatoshi - der Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin und Beziehung: Warum Überzeugen selten funktioniert
item.description:
Deine Begeisterung für Bitcoin ist riesig, aber zu Hause stößt du auf Granit? In dieser Folge von "einemillionsatoshi" erfährst du, wie du das Thema Bitcoin in deine Beziehung bringst, ohne einen Familienstreit auszulösen. Ich bespreche, warum technisches Fachchinesisch oft der falsche Weg ist und wie du stattdessen über gesellschaftliche Werte und echte Lösungen für Alltagsprobleme wie die Inflation sprichst.

Erwähnte Podcasts & Ressourcen:

👉 Anita Posch: https://anitaposch.com/

👉 Heart Money (Nicole) https://www.youtube.com/@heartmoney👉Meme: https://x.com/Ropeium/status/2006898791652176109


Sponsoren:

👉 Relai, 21bitcoin, Pocketbitcoin, Bitbox02, Cointracking, Seedor und Firefish⁠

🔖Finde hier die Aktionscodes und spare Gebühren: https://www.einemillionsatoshi.de/aktionscodes-und-rabatte/

❤️ Spenden über Lightning an einemillionsats@fountain.fm.


Vielen Dank, dass du meine Arbeit unterstützt.

Haftungsausschluss: Die Inhalte dienen zur Information und sind kein finanzieller Rat oder Empfehlung.

]]>

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends – #56 Community Q&A – 5 Fragen zu Kursprognose, Volatilität & Altcoins
item.description:
**Diese Episode wird von PostFinance präsentiert***

PostFinance lanciert als erste Schweizer Retailbank ein E-Vermögensverwaltungsmandat, das global ausgerichtete Anlagen, Megatrends und Kryptowährungen kombiniert.

Infos zum E-Vermögensverwaltungsmandat «Zukunft» finden sich hier.

********************************************************

Rino beantwortet die 5-Fragen aus der Community.

  • Chris aus Bern fragt, wieso man in Bitcoin investieren soll, wenn es so schwankt.
  • Alessandro, ein 19-jähriger Lehrling, will wissen, wie viel er pro Monat investieren sollte.
  • Elmar interessiert sich für das 150'000-USD-Kursziel.
  • Diego fragt, ob andere Coins nicht auch eine Chance haben.
  • Und ein Hörer stellt die Frage: Ist Bitcoin eine Übergangstechnologie wie CD→MP3?

Weiterführende Link

Live Podcast am 20.5.26 zum Bitcoin Pizza Day:

https://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/veranstaltungen/bitcoin-pizza-day-der-live-podcast-2026/

Bitcoin Sparplan Guide – Schritt für Schritt

https://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/bitcoin-sparplan-einrichten-so-funktionierts-in-5-einfachen-schritten/

Die 6 Bärenmärkte analysiert – Was Investoren lernen

https://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/bitcoin-baerenmarkt-was-die-geschichte-der-sechs-einbrueche-wirklich-lehrt/


Und bleibe informiert mit unserem Newsletter! https://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/newsletter/


Infos zum ⁠E-Vermögensverwaltungsmandat «Zukunft» finden sich hier⁠.

https://www.postfinance.ch/de/privat/anlegen/loesungen/vermoegensverwaltung/e-vermoegensverwaltung.html?utm_source=house-of-satoshi&utm_medium=spotify&utm_campaign=sponsoring

https://www.postfinance.ch/de/privat/anlegen/loesungen/vermoegensverwaltung/e-vermoegensverwaltung.html?utm_source=house-of-satoshi&utm_medium=spotify&utm_campaign=sponsoring

item.title: The Peter McCormack Show – #173 - Liberman - We’re Training AI to Get Rid Of Us
item.description:
Two brothers who escaped Russia say we have 2 years before AI replaces us - and we're paying the corporations building it.


Daniil & David Liberman sold their first company to Snapchat. Now they're racing to build a decentralised alternative to OpenAI and Google before the window closes. They explain why centralised AI ends in a two-tier world - a small elite with access, and the rest of us as "moving parts" - and why the next 24 months decide which path we take.


In this episode:

→ Why you can't opt out of AI and stay competitive

→ The recursive loop: AI is now writing AI

→ Why the kill switch won't work

→ What they saw inside Russia in 2008 that's happening now with AI

→ The darkest scenario they almost didn't want to say out loud


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -


TIMESTAMPS:

01:01:45 - The Mythos Fear

item.title: Bitcoin Fortress – BF214 - Top Bitcoin News - 5/3/26
item.description:
Date: May 3, 2026
Block Height: 947751
Moscow Time: 1269
Fees: 1 / 1 / 2

 

In this episode:
We break down the biggest Bitcoin stories from April 26 to May 3, 2026, including key announcements from the Bitcoin 2026 conference in Las Vegas, growing institutional adoption, Bitcoin-backed lending and payments, mining and AI trends, and shifting regulatory signals. We connect it all back to a bigger theme: Bitcoin as a new monetary architecture built on rules, scarcity, and self-custody—contrasting sharply with the debt-driven fiat system.

 

Bitcoin Fortress YouTube Channel:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCEPGN1YCIQcMxkUig5GaNrQ

 

Bitcoin Fortress Substack Featured Post:

Bitcoin vs Monetary Architecture
https://bitcoinfortress.substack.com/p/bitcoin-vs-monetary-architecture

 

Bitcoin Fortress Books:

  • Bitcoin Fortress: A Simple Guide to Bitcoin for Beginners

  • Bitcoin Retirement and Estate Planning

  • The Bitcoin Lifestyle

  • The Architecture of Money

Follow me on Nostr:

npub122fpu8lwu2eu2zfmrymcfed9tfgeray5quj78jm6zavj78phnqdsu3v4h5

 

NEWS (April 26, 2026 – May 3, 2026)

Bitcoin 2026 Conference
https://2026.b.tc/

SEC and CFTC Signal Regulatory Reset
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/sec-cftc-chiefs-signal-new-day-for-crypto

DOJ and FBI Refocus on Crypto Crime, Not Developers
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/bitcoin-isnt-going-anywhere-fbi-discuss

Bitcoin Self-Custody as a Civil Liberty
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/bitcoin-self-custody-framed-civil-liberty

Block Revamps Bitcoin Ecosystem with Bitkey and Square
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/block-bitcoin-ecosystem-with-bitkey-wallet

Strike Announces Bitcoin Lending Proof-of-Concept
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/strike-ceo-jack-mallers-bitcoin-conference

Aven Launches Bitcoin-Backed Visa Card
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/aven-launches-bitcoin-backed-visa-card

Bitcoin Loans and Homeownership
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/how-bitcoin-backed-loans-homeownership

Steak ’n Shake Says Bitcoin Payments Cut Processing Costs
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/bitcoin-is-fueling-steak-n-shake-comeback

MARA Launches Bitcoin-Focused Foundation
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/mara-launches-bitcoin-focused-foundation

Galoy Expands Bitcoin-Native Banking Platform
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/galoy-pushes-deeper-into-u-s-banking

Paystand Launches USDb on Bitcoin Layers
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/business/paystand-launches-usdb-stablecoin-on-bitcoin-layers-for-100t-b2b-payments

Strategy Buys 3,273 More Bitcoin
https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/04/27/michael-saylor-s-strategy-buys-3-273-bitcoin-as-it-inches-closer-to-its-1-million-target

Riot Platforms, AMD, and Bitcoin Mining/Data Centers
https://www.investors.com/news/riot-platforms-stock-earnings-bitcoin-miner-data-center-amd-contract-capacity/

House Republicans Warn Bitcoin Weakness Benefits China
https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/house-republicans-bitcoin-weakness-china

Stablecoin Legislation Compromise
https://www.barrons.com/articles/crypto-bill-stablecoin-yields-coinbase-clarity-act-tillis-alsobrooks-78dd5028

Stephan Livera Podcast — Open Source Funding
https://stephanlivera.com/

Jack Mallers Show
https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-jack-mallers-show/id1695949365

 

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute – Bitcoin Policy Hour: Crypto-Redollarization: Gold, Tether & Bitcoin Shaping the New Monetary Order
item.description:
Why did Tether launch a U.S. stablecoin now? Why does Coinbase have so much influence in Congress? And what’s really behind the SEC–CFTC harmonization push? Bitcoin Policy Hour breaks down the biggest regulatory stories shaping Bitcoin’s future plus a deep look at the debasement trade driving gold, silver, and potentially bitcoin higher.🔶 Connect with Zack Shapiro on X: https://x.com/zackbshapiro🔶 Connect with Zack Cohen on X: https://x.com/zackcohen_🔶 Connect with Ken Egan on X: https://x.com/Bayman11771🔶 Learn more about the Bitcoin Policy Institute: https://www.btcpolicy.org/Chapters: 03:15 – Tether’s GENIUS-Compliant U.S. Stablecoin Explained 07:30 – Is Tether’s U.S. Launch a Political Hedge? 11:45 – Stablecoins, Circle, and Global Liquidity 15:30 – SEC–CFTC Harmonization and Regulatory Power 20:10 – Market Structure, BRCA, and Developer Protections 26:00 – Section 1960 and the National Security Debate 33:20 – Why Coinbase Has So Much Influence in Congress 41:00 – Stablecoin Yield, Banks, and Political Fatigue 47:00 – Gold, Silver, Debasement, and Bitcoin’s Moment

]]>

item.title: This Week in Bitcoin – 103: The Energy Squeeze
item.description:
Why energy shocks, bond pressure, and Fed games have everyone but Bitcoiners freaking out.

Episode Links

  • 🇺🇸 Buy Sats on River - The best way to stack in the US
  • 🇨🇦 The Bitcoin Well - An amazing automatic self-custody Bitcoin platform
  • ⚡ The Bitcoin Company - Spending your Bitcoin Via Lightning

Show Notes

  • Bitcoin Is At An All-Time High
  • Higher Energy Prices from Iran War Will Drive World Into Recession, Says Citadel CEO Ken Griffin

item.title: Sound Money Bitcoin Podcast – #323 KI übernimmt alles – auch Bitcoin? Banken-Insider Joe Martin im Gespräch
item.description:
Joe Martin kommt aus dem Bankensektor und kennt das klassische Finanzsystem von innen. Als Educator, Speaker und Autor beschäftigt er sich mit der Schnittstelle von Technologie, KI und Geld – und was diese Entwicklungen für die Zukunft unseres Finanzsystems bedeuten. Themen dieser Folge:

Wie KI unsere Welt gerade strukturell verändert – und was das für Geld bedeutet

Welche Risiken KI konkret für Bitcoin mit sich bringt

Welche Chancen entstehen: KI-Agenten, die autonom in Bitcoin bezahlen

Was ein Insider aus dem Bankensektor über die Zukunft des Geldes denkt

Warum Bitcoin in einer KI-dominierten Welt relevanter werden könnte

item.itunes:summary:
Joe Martin kommt aus dem Bankensektor und kennt das klassische Finanzsystem von innen. Als Educator, Speaker und Autor beschäftigt er sich mit der Schnittstelle von Technologie, KI und Geld – und was diese Entwicklungen für die Zukunft unseres Finanzsystems bedeuten. Themen dieser Folge:

Wie KI unsere Welt gerade strukturell verändert – und was das für Geld bedeutet

Welche Risiken KI konkret für Bitcoin mit sich bringt

Welche Chancen entstehen: KI-Agenten, die autonom in Bitcoin bezahlen

Was ein Insider aus dem Bankensektor über die Zukunft des Geldes denkt

Warum Bitcoin in einer KI-dominierten Welt relevanter werden könnte


Partner BitBox02

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value – Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠BitVault⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.


Follow us on:

Website: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠https://storeofbitcoin.com/⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

item.title: Bitcoin Archive w Archie – $39 Trillion US Debt Bomb is Ticking | Lyn Alden
item.description:
Is The US really heading towards a $39 Trillion Collapse?

In this conversation with Lyn Alden, we explore one of the biggest macro shifts happening right now.

From BRICS nations, to alternative payment rails. Global trade is slowly diversifying away from a single dominant currency, and that shift could have massive implications for Bitcoin.

⚠️ This isn’t a sudden collapse; it’s a slow rebalancing of global power.


CONNECT WITH LYN ALDEN

X: https://x.com/LynAldenContact

Website: lynalden.com


FOLLOW THE PODCAST

🌳 AMAZON - https://bit.ly/BitcoinArchiveAM

item.title: Bitcoin Magazine Podcast – The Quantum Debate Dominates Bitcoin 2026 | Bitcoin Policy Hour Ep 36
item.description:
"If we popped the quantum solution today, I think we'd be at $150K in two months." That's Ken Egan's call on Bitcoin Policy Hour Episode 36, joined by Zack Shapiro and host Zack Cohen. The trio walk through the Tillis-Brooks stablecoin yield compromise, the Clarity Act markup window, Admiral Paparo's watershed Indo-Pacom Bitcoin testimony, Secretary Hegseth's national security follow-up, and the quantum issue holding institutional capital on the sideline. 🔶 Connect with Zack Shapiro on X: https://x.com/zackbshapiro🔶 Connect with Zack Cohen on X: https://x.com/zackcohen_🔶 Connect with Ken Egan on X: https://x.com/Bayman11771🔶 Learn more about the Bitcoin Policy Institute: https://www.btcpolicy.org/Chapters: 01:30 — Bitcoin Policy Hour Ep. 36 Begins: Bitcoin 2026 Recap Sets The Stage03:00 — The Tillis-Brooks Stablecoin Yield Compromise Explained10:00 — The Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act & Software Developer Protections18:00 — The Quantum Debate Dominating Bitcoin 2026 Capitol Hill Conversations26:00 — Admiral Paparo's Senate Armed Services Testimony On Bitcoin34:00 — Secretary Hegseth, Department Of War & Bitcoin As National Security Tool42:00 — BPI Asia Launches With Tomas Furukawa & The Taiwan Bitcoin Reserve Report50:00 — Price Action: Why Macro Liquidity Favors Bitcoin Heading Into Summer58:00 — The $150K Target & Year-End Bitcoin Number Game#Bitcoin #BitcoinPolicy #BitcoinPolicyHour #BitcoinPolicyInstitute #BPI #ZackCohen #ZackShapiro #KenEgan #ClarityAct #MarketStructure #Stablecoins #TillisBrooks #BlockchainRegulatoryCertaintyAct #AdmiralPaparo #IndoPacom #BitcoinNode #PeteHegseth #QuantumBitcoin #BitcoinPrice #BPIAsia #TaiwanBitcoinReserve #SamouraiWallet #TornadoCash #SoftwareDevelopers #SenatorLummis #BitcoinMagazine #SoundMoney #BitcoinAdoption #NationalSecurity #BitcoinReserveDISCLAIMER: The views and opinions expressed in this show are those of the participants and do not necessarily reflect the official policy or position of BTC Inc., Bitcoin Magazine, or any affiliated entities. This content is provided for informational and educational purposes only and should not be construed as investment, legal, tax, or accounting advice. Nothing contained in this show constitutes a solicitation, recommendation, endorsement, or offer to buy or sell any securities or financial instruments. Viewers should consult their own advisors before making financial or business decisions.

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show – The Case Against BIP-110 with Erik Aronesty | Bitcoin Infinity Show #201
item.description:
Erik Aronesty joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about his role in BIP 148 and the User-Activated Soft Fork that reshaped the block size wars, and why he eventually traded his big-block stance for a small-block one rooted in bandwidth and node decentralization. He shares hard-earned lessons on Bitcoin mining economics, the long-term security budget question, and why he believes Bitcoin still needs protocol-level privacy through ideas like Mimblewimble alongside covenants like OPCTV for vaulting and self-custody. The conversation digs into BIP 110, OPRETURN policy, the difference between consensus and mempool rules, the dangers of KYC exchanges and Coinbase, and what it actually takes to keep Bitcoin sound money for the next generation.

Connect with Erik:

https://x.com/simulx4

Connect with Us:

https://www.bitcoininfinityshow.com/

https://bitcoininfinitystore.com

https://primal.net/infinity

https://primal.net/knut

https://primal.net/luke

https://twitter.com/BtcInfinityShow

https://twitter.com/knutsvanholm

https://twitter.com/lukedewolf

Thanks to our sponsors - check out their websites for info:

BitBox: https://bitbox.swiss/infinity - Use Code INFINITY for 5% off!

Bitcoin Adviser: https://content.thebitcoinadviser.com/freedom

item.title: Raoul Pal: The Journey Man – The End of Human Trading?
item.description:
Raoul welcomes Yoni Assia, Founder and CEO of eToro, explore how AI agents, tokenization, and crypto rails could reshape global markets into 24/7, machine-driven systems. Raoul and Yoni also argue that finance is moving toward a future where AI doesn’t just assist investors — it trades, builds, learns, and forms capital on its own. Recorded April 30, 2026.


Today’s sponsor is Plus500 US. Take your trading to the next level with cross-market contracts, from precious metals to key indices, and more. item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update – Bitcoin Reclaims $80K as Stablecoins Surge and Trump Crypto Scrutiny Grows
item.description:
Brought to you by orangerock.com. Trade Bitcoin, crypto, stocks and commodities. No surveillance, no friction, no limits.Want your brand on Bitcoin.com content? Reach out to ads@bitcoin.com.In this episode of The Weekly, Graham Stone and Alex Richardson break down a fast-moving week across Bitcoin, stablecoins, and crypto politics.Bitcoin pushes back toward $80K while stocks continue hitting all-time highs, raising the question of whether this is real strength or late-cycle euphoria. They also dig into the stablecoin sector as total market cap reaches a new high, euro stablecoins begin to grow under MiCA, and the broader role of stablecoins in global finance keeps expanding.The episode also covers:bearish calls for Bitcoin and the stock market why stablecoins are starting to look less like “crypto” and more like money World Liberty Financial and the growing scrutiny around Trump-linked crypto projects why Democrats are escalating attacks on crypto grift narratives a disturbing FBI case involving a suspected “reverse wrench attack”A wide-ranging conversation on Bitcoin, macro, stablecoins, political risk, and the narratives shaping crypto right now.Graham Stone X Alex Richardson01:30 - Bitcoin's Price Surge and Short Sellers02:24 - Bearish Market Analysis by Gareth Soloway03:21 - Economic Predictions by Notable Figures05:28 - Stablecoin Market Developments08:16 - Euro-Pegged Stablecoins Growth10:27 - Stablecoins and Regulatory Challenges13:00 - World Liberty Financial Controversy18:15 - Political Implications of Crypto Controversies20:51 - Reverse Wrench Attack Incident

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Optech Podcast – Bitcoin Optech: Newsletter #403 Recap
item.description:
Gustavo Flores Echaiz and Brandon Black are joined by Olaoluwa Osuntokun to discuss Newsletter #403.


News

● Binary fuse filters as an alternative to BIP158's GCS (19:05)


Changing consensus

● Post-quantum HD wallets with fallback SPHINCS keys (31:07)

● Discussion of a post-quantum output type (34:42)

● Proposal to embed post-quantum keys in tapscript without consensus changes (38:03)

● BIP54 demonstration of slow blocks on signet (43:28)

● Post-quantum BIP86 recovery using zk-STARK proofs of BIP32 seeds (1:05)


Releases and release candidates

● Core Lightning 26.04.1 (48:16)

● BTCPay Server 2.3.8 (50:15)

● BTCPay Server 2.3.9 (51:52)


Notable code and documentation changes

● Bitcoin Core #33671 (52:39)

● Bitcoin Core #34885 (58:01)

● Bitcoin Core #33920 (59:57)

● Bitcoin Core #34911 (1:02:00)

● BIPs #1548 (1:04:47)

● HWI #831 (1:08:17)

● BDK #2188 (1:09:11)

● BDK #2115 (1:10:14)

]]>

Einordnung & Überblick

Diese Woche liefen in der Kryptowelt gleich mehrere Themen parallel, die auf den ersten Blick dramatisch wirken, bei näherer Betrachtung aber differenziertere Einordnungen verlangen. Eric und Sascha analysieren die wichtigsten Entwicklungen, ohne Panikmache und ohne Finanzberatung.

Themen dieser Woche

• Bitcoin ETF-Inflows: erstmals seit Januar 2026 wieder über einer Milliarde Dollar

• Geopolitische Lage rund um die Strasse von Hormuz und Marktbewegung

• Crypto Clarity Act: Robinhood und Coinbase CEOs signalisieren Zustimmung

• Stablecoin-Yields weiterhin verboten, Airdrops erlaubt – aktueller Stand

• Polymarket: 71 Prozent Wahrscheinlichkeit für Verabschiedung in 2026

• Coinbase streicht 700 Stellen: KI, Kosten und der Marktzyklus

• Japan tokenisiert Staatsanleihen: größte Banken und Wertpapierfirmen schließen sich zusammen

• Tokenisierungsmarkt verdoppelt sich seit Anfang 2026

• Canton und Stellar als Infrastruktur-Chains für tokenisierte Assets

• Grüne Haltefrist-Entwurf: vollständige Abschaffung gefordert, 5 Mrd. Euro Mehreinnahmen erwartet

• Übergangsregel für Coins erworben vor dem 31.12.2025

• CDU/CSU gegen Reform, SPD und Gruene dafür – Mehrheiten fraglich

• Strategy erwägt unter bestimmten Bedingungen Bitcoin-Verkauf

• Polymarket: Bitcoin-Verkauf durch Strategy bis Ende 2026 von unter 10 auf 47 Prozent

item.title: BITCOIN & ALTCOINS – Bitcoin zurück bei 80.000? Neue Dynamik im Markt
item.description:
Bei Bitcoin und Altcoins kommt endlich wieder Bewegung in die Performance – und zwar nach oben. Die Marke von 80.000 Dollar ist seit Wochenbeginn erneut in den Fokus der Krypto-Anleger gerückt. Woher der Auftrieb kommt, ob es sich dabei um ein trügerisches Signal handelt und worauf man sich in der laufenden Woche einstellen sollte, erfahren von Oliver Michel (tokentus investment AG) in der neuen Ausgabe von „BITCOIN & ALTCOINS“.

Hinweis: Die im Podcast besprochenen Coins und Token stellen keine spezifischen Kauf- oder Anlageempfehlungen dar. Die Moderatoren oder der Verlag haften nicht für etwaige Verluste, die aufgrund der Umsetzung der im Podcast diskutierten Gedanken oder Ideen entstehen.

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse – Can Bitcoin Escape the Quantum Black Hole?
item.description:
Is quantum computing Bitcoin's biggest hidden risk - and is anyone actually solving it? In this episode, Dominic Weibel and Luca Gnos sit down with Charles Edwards, founder of Capriole Investments, to break down how geopolitics, macro conditions, and quantum risk are shaping Bitcoin's next move. Edwards shares his onchain valuation tools pointing to a ~43% discount from fair value, explains why institutions now dominate Bitcoin's demand structure, and makes the case that quantum risk is already suppressing price - with a potential major repricing on the horizon within 12–24 months.

]]>

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin, America, and Why Socialism Always Fails | Josh Hendrickson
item.description:
In this episode, I sat down with Josh Hendrickson, BPI Senior Fellow and Chair of Economics at the University of Mississippi, to dig into the uncomfortable truth that Bitcoin's success has made political engagement unavoidable, not optional. We covered why the normalization of socialist ideas in America is both predictable and dangerous, why the "just leave me alone" mentality always loses to those who refuse to leave you alone, and how the proof-of-work ethos connects Bitcoin's rabbit hole to the kind of first-principles thinking America desperately needs right now.

item.title: Krypto Corner – Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten – Bonus zu Kap. 31:Der Cash-Out Flaschenhals & der perfekte Mittelherkunftsnachweis
item.description:
Macht Krypto wirklich glücklich? In dieser 20-minütigen Bonus-Analyse holen unsere KI-Moderatoren Tom zurück auf den Boden der Tatsachen. Zahlen auf einem Bildschirm machen auf Dauer nicht satt – Tom will seine Krypto-Gewinne realisieren und sich einen echten, rostrot lackierten VW-Bus kaufen. Wir erklären dir, warum genau dieser Moment der gefährlichste Flaschenhals der gesamten Krypto-Reise ist.

Lerne den harten Aufprall zwischen dem freien Web3 und dem traditionellen, streng regulierten Bankensystem kennen. Wir warnen dich eindringlich vor dem sogenannten "Smurfing" (dem Aufteilen von großen Überweisungen in kleine Häppchen) und zeigen auf, warum der Bank-Algorithmus dabei sofort zuschlägt und dies als illegalen Geldwäsche-Versuch wertet.

Das absolute Highlight: Der Mittelherkunftsnachweis. Wir erklären dir, wie du ein perfektes, wasserdichtes Dossier (mit Steuerberichten und Transaktionshistorien) für deine Bank erstellst. Lerne, warum du den Berater zwingendproaktiv kontaktieren musst, damit dein Konto bei der Auszahlung der Gewinne nicht plötzlich eingefroren wird. Und vergiss niemals: Ein Teil der Gewinne gehört nicht dir, sondern dem Finanzamt!

Die Highlights dieser Bonus-Analyse:

  • Die Schleuse: Warum der Cash-Out der gefährlichste Moment für dein Bankkonto ist.

  • Smurfing: Warum die Salami-Taktik bei Überweisungen illegal ist.

  • Der Mittelherkunftsnachweis: So beweist du wasserdicht, dass dein Geld sauber ist.

  • Proaktive Kommunikation: Wie du deine Bank warnst, bevor die Algorithmen zuschlagen.

Der Ton wechselt von verträumter VW-Bus-Vorfreude hin zu einer hochseriösen, eiskalten Warnung vor dem Geldwäschegesetz!

🚀 BUCH-RELEASE: Sichere dir die perfekten Dossier-Vorlagen für deinen Bankberater mit „Krypto verstehen – sicher starten“ (Band 1) von Sascha Swen Heiter.

🔥 EXKLUSIVE BUCH-PREVIEW: Dieser Podcast bietet dir einen exklusiven Vorab-Einblick in das Standardwerk der Krypto-Welt. Exklusiv: Nur hier im Podcast erfährst du Details und Insider-Wissen aus den 33 Kapiteln des Buchs.Deep Dive: Wir gehen tiefer als jeder Blogpost. Die genauen Vorlagen für den Bankberater, Checklisten für den Cash-Out und Tipps zu krypto-freundlichen Neobanken findest du im offiziellen Buch. Es ist ab sofort überall erhältlich!

⚖️ Rechtlicher Hinweis & Haftungsausschluss (ESSENZIELL): Sämtliche Inhalte dieses Podcasts dienen ausschließlich der allgemeinen Information und Unterhaltung. Alle Angaben erfolgen ohne Gewähr.

  • Keine Beratung: Dieser Podcast stellt zu keinem Zeitpunkt eine Anlageberatung, Rechtsberatung oder Steuerberatung dar.

  • Eigenverantwortung: Krypto-Investments sind hochriskant und können zum Totalverlust führen. Jeder Hörer handelt auf eigene Gefahr und Verantwortung.

  • Steuern & Compliance (AML): Die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptowährungen und die Geldwäscheprävention der Banken sind hochkomplex. Bitte konsultiere zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater oder Anwalt für die aktuelle Rechtslage in der DACH-Region (Deutschland, Österreich, Schweiz) für die Jahre 2025/2026.

  • Haftung: Eine Haftung für Schäden, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdrücklich ausgeschlossen.

Basiert auf dem Buch von Sascha Swen Heiter. Abonniere den Podcast für dein wöchentliches Krypto-Update!

#Bitcoin #Finanzen #KryptoCorner #Geldanlage #Blockchain #SaschaSwenHeiter #Krypto #Crypto #DACH #Investieren2026 #CashOut #Mittelherkunft #Geldwäschegesetz #Kontosperrung #BonusFolge


]]>

item.title: BTC-ECHO | Bitcoin & Krypto Podcasts – Invest #207 | Melt-Up statt Crash? Warum Bitcoin jetzt steigen könnte
item.description:
Rallye statt Crash?

Bitcoin kämpft sich zurück in Richtung 80.000 US-Dollar – doch unter der Oberfläche passiert gerade deutlich mehr. Während das Sentiment im Krypto-Markt weiterhin schwach bleibt, verdichten sich im Makro-Bereich die Signale für ein mögliches Szenario, das viele aktuell komplett unterschätzen: einen sogenannten Melt-Up.

In dieser Folge analysieren Johannes & BTC-ECHO Chefredakteur Sven Wagenknecht, warum genau dieses bullische Setup entstehen könnte – trotz geopolitischer Risiken, Inflationssorgen und schwachem Krypto-Narrativ.

Im Fokus stehen: – Warum fallende Realzinsen ein Gamechanger für Bitcoin sein könnten – Welche Rolle die Fed-Bilanz und globale Liquidität spielen – Warum KI, Gold und Aktien aktuell Kapital binden – und was das für BTC bedeutet – Weshalb institutionelle Nachfrage gerade ein unterschätzter Treiber ist – Und welches Risiko viele Anleger aktuell komplett ignorieren

Außerdem im Altcoin-Check: Litecoin unter Druck nach Sicherheitsvorfall – und die wachsende Gefahr durch KI-gestützte Exploits im gesamten Krypto-Sektor.

]]>

item.title: Rob Wallace | Bitcoin News – The Oil Crisis Is Hiding a $4.5T Debt Bomb No One Can Pay | Infra
item.description:
The Biggest Bubble Ever? | Infra Explains Why Markets Are Breaking Upwards, Debt Is Exploding & Bitcoin Could Hit $10M

In this macro deep dive, Rob Wallace sits down with market analyst Robert (@infraa_) to unpack what may be the most dangerous financial environment in modern history.

Despite war in the Middle East, soaring oil prices, record sovereign debt, and mounting stress in global credit markets, stocks continue ripping higher. Why?

Infra argues that governments and central banks are desperately trying to keep the bubble alive through debt issuance, market intervention, liquidity injections, and financial engineering. But according to him, the system is reaching a breaking point.

]]>

Infra argues that governments and central banks are desperately trying to keep the bubble alive through debt issuance, market intervention, liquidity injections, and financial engineering. But according to him, the system is reaching a breaking point.

item.title: All In Bitcoin – 031 Jameson Lopp: Why We Choose Convenience Over Freedom (Nostr, Privacy & Bitcoin) I All in Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
🎙️ Jameson Lopp: Why We Choose Convenience Over Freedom (Nostr, Privacy & Bitcoin)

Freedom is being traded for convenience, and most people don’t even notice.

In Part 2 with Jameson Lopp, we go deep into freedom tech, privacy tools, censorship-resistant communication, and the future of digital sovereignty.

Jameson explains why convenience is the easiest way to lose freedom, why tools like Signal, GrapheneOS, Linux, Bitcoin, and Nostr matter, and why freedom tech only wins if people actually use it.

We also discuss Telegram vs Signal, Nostr beyond “just another Twitter,” Bitcoin self-custody, ETFs, privacy, and the growing risks of centralization.

This is a conversation about liberty, communication, responsibility, and the tools we may need before it’s too late.

https://bitbox.swiss/allinbitcoin or use Code ALLINBITCOIN

item.title: No Second Best - A Bitcoin Podcast – Did the Federal Reserve Just Open the Door to Bitcoin?
item.description:
Jamie Dimon just went on national television to push back against Bitcoin and crypto legislation. Hours later, a Bitcoin exchange gained direct access to the Federal Reserve's settlement rails.

At the same time, Morgan Stanley filed for a spot Bitcoin ETF while geopolitical tensions escalated in the Middle East and Bitcoin surged.

This episode breaks down the growing conflict between the traditional banking system and the emerging Bitcoin financial infrastructure, and why the global monetary system may already be bending toward neutral, hard money.

]]>

item.title: The Why Bitcoin Show – #100 - 100 Not Out: Reflections, Regrets and Why I'm Just Getting Started
item.description:
Episode 100. No intro. No ads. Just me.

This one is different. Just an honest reflection on 100 episodes, what this journey has actually been like, and where things are heading.

I share what drove me to start the show, the momentum I built and lost, the guests who genuinely changed how I think, and something personal I haven't said publicly before about confidence, doubt, and what it's taken to finally back myself.

I also explain why I built My Bitcoin Will, a DIY Bitcoin inheritance starter kit designed to help people get off zero and start closing the gap between law, access, and education.

If you're not ready to dive in yet, start with the free Bitcoin Inheritance Stress Test or download the checklist at My Bitcoin Will.

Also, some gentle shilling from my side. I've written a book. No Tenants, No Troubles: The Case for Digital Over Real Estate. Available on Amazon now: https://www.dalewarburton.com/book

Need a hand with self-custody? Book a session with me to get your Bitcoin security house in order.

And get on Nostr if you haven't already. It's a game changer. npub1r94hh3kt6re3j5jv7yg8rw0ah5fg90vw9pjklxzknvhdkx0famfsn0njzt

]]>

item.title: State of Bitcoin with Brandon Keys – The European Bitcoin Ban Hiding In Plain Sight with Matyas Kuchar - State of Bitcoin Ep. 238
item.description:
Until last year, more than 1,000 restaurants in Czech Republic accepted Bitcoin. Then it all stopped.

The MiCA regulation didn't ban Bitcoin in Europe. It did something far more effective — it made the rails impossible to operate. And as the Czech merchant economy quietly disappeared, two bigger forces started moving in the background: the petrodollar dying, and CBDCs coming online in Europe THIS YEAR.

In this episode, I sit down with Matyas Kuchar — co-founder of BTC Prague, the largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe, and one of the most thoughtful voices on European Bitcoin policy — to break down why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe, why the European surveillance state is spreading faster than Americans realize, and why he believes Bitcoin must win because the alternative is just so much worse.

You'll learn:

→ How MiCA quietly killed 1,000+ Bitcoin-accepting restaurants in Czech Republic — and why it wasn't even a direct ban

→ Why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe (Trezor, Slush Pool, BIP-39, General Bytes — all started in Prague)

→ Why the petrodollar is dying — and what the loss of US hegemony means for global decentralization

→ Why Europeans use Bitcoin as money while Americans treat it as digital gold — and which approach is right

→ The European CBDC threat: pilots are launching THIS YEAR — and why most Americans haven't heard about it

→ The CBDC mechanism in Matyas's words: "You can analyze, you can control, you can surveil, you can send from a helicopter"

→ Why even an anarcho-capitalist now meets with politicians — and what changed his mind

→ Why Bitcoin is no longer just savings — it's the network of people building the future you actually want to live in

🚨 JOIN ME AT BTC PRAGUE 2026

The largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe — June 11-13. Use code GREENCANDLE for discounted tickets:

https://btcprague.com/

🎯 PROTECT YOUR BITCOIN WITH SALT LENDING

Borrow against your Bitcoin without selling a single sat. Green Candle viewers get an exclusive offer:

https://saltlending.com/green-candle

🎯 PLAN YOUR WEALTH WITH STRONG WEALTH

Build a Bitcoin-aligned wealth strategy — estate planning, tax optimization, portfolio construction:

https://strongwealth.net/

🎯 MINE BITCOIN WITH SIMPLE MINING

First-year repairs free for Green Candle listeners:

https://simplemining.io/green-candle

📊 REFERENCED IN THIS EPISODE

• MiCA regulation (EU 2023/1114) — Markets in Crypto-Assets framework

• Czech Republic Bitcoin tax exemption (3-year hold rule)

• Slush Pool (founded 2010 in Prague, first ever Bitcoin mining pool)

• BIP-39 seed phrase standard (developed in Prague)

• Trezor hardware wallet (first ever, founded in Prague)

• EU CBDC pilot programs (launching 2026)

• BTC Prague 2026 conference — June 11-13

Bitcoin #BTCPrague #Matyas #MiCA #BitcoinEurope #CBDC #BitcoinPolicy #EuropeanBitcoin #BitcoinConference #SoundMoney #Petrodollar #BitcoinAdoption #CzechRepublic #FinancialFreedom #BitcoinNews

🔔 SUBSCRIBE for weekly Bitcoin, macro, and personal finance content.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This video is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin & Crypto News Today | 2 Min News | The Daily News Now! – South Korean Crypto Investors Slash Holdings by Half
item.description:
South Korean crypto investors significantly reduced their holdings by half in a year, shifting towards the stock market. Trading volumes and won deposits on top exchanges plummeted. Stablecoins held up better but face uncertainty due to upcoming regulations. A 22% crypto gain tax and exchange suspensions add to the challenges. However, Samsung SDSs blockchain platform for tokenized securities offers a promising outlook.

item.title: BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin und Deutschland: Wo stehen wir und wo kann die Reise hingehen? #6 mit Larry
item.description:
Herzlich willkommen zum BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast(https://www.bitbucks.de)!

Heute haben wir einen besonderen Gast: Larry, bekannt als @B1tcoin3r auf X. Larry ist ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Experte, Vortragsredner und Workshop-Host. Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in führenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir über die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die mögliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel Spaß beim Zuhören!

Zudem reden wir auch noch über die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- Lösungen für eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik überhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einführt

- Bitcoin Städte Spiel: Errate die fünf beliebtesten Bitcoin Städte weltweit

Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in führenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir über die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die mögliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel Spaß beim Zuhören!

Zudem reden wir auch noch über die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- Lösungen für eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik überhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einführt

- Bitcoin Städte Spiel: Errate die fünf beliebtesten Bitcoin Städte weltweit

- Wie Bitcoin Larrys Leben verändert hat

item.title: Bitcoin Audible – Read_943 - The Fabric of Desires
item.description:
"It is not markets that made money possible. It is collectibles, which we now call money, that make markets possible."

~ Nick Szabo

What if everything we've been told about how money emerged is backwards? Nick Szabo's first article in nearly a decade tells the story of a stolen canoe, a tribal feud, and a string of shells – and uses it to challenge one of the most repeated ideas in economics. Did money come from barter, or did it come from something far older and far more human?

Check out the original article: The Fabric of Desires by Nick Szabo (Link: https://jan3.com/blog/the-fabric-of-desires)

References from the episode

  • Nick Szabo's blog, Unenumerated – where so much of his foundational writing lives (Link: https://unenumerated.blogspot.com/)
  • Aqua Wallet, the superapp by Jan3: Bitcoin, Lightning, and Liquid all in one, with USDT on Liquid too (Link: https://aqua.net/)
  • The Nakamoto Institute: the best archive there is for Szabo's work and early Bitcoin thought (Link: https://nakamotoinstitute.org/)
  • Carl Menger's On the Origins of Money – worth reading even where I think it falls short (Link: https://www.socsci.mcmaster.ca/~econ/ugcm/3ll3/menger/money.txt)

Host Links

  • ⁠Guy on Nostr ⁠(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • ⁠Guy on X ⁠(Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • ⁠Bitcoin Audible on X⁠ (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)
  • The Guy Swann Network Broadcast Room on Keet (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3na6v839)

Check out our awesome partners!

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get ⁠10% off the COLDCARD⁠ with code BITCOINAUDIBLE ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠(Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)

“There's always a story. It's all stories, really. The sun coming up every day is a story. Everything's got a story in it. Change the story, change the world.”

~ Terry Pratchett, A Hat Full of Sky

]]>

item.title: Bald in Bitcoin – Bald in Bitcoin - Folge 12: Warum sparen Dich nicht mehr schützt
item.description:
Thema der Folge

In dieser Folge geht es um die Frage, warum klassisches Sparen heute nicht mehr automatisch schützt.

Früher konnten Sparer oft reale Kaufkraft aufbauen, weil die Zinsen oberhalb der Inflation lagen. Heute ist das häufig anders. Viele Menschen sehen zwar weiterhin stabile Zahlen auf dem Konto, verlieren aber schleichend Kaufkraft.

Kerngedanken Sparen ist nicht falsch, aber es schützt heute nicht mehr automatisch. Entscheidend ist nicht der nominale Kontostand, sondern die Kaufkraft. Zinsen müssen immer im Verhältnis zur Inflation betrachtet werden. Offizielle Inflation ist ein Durchschnitt, aber nicht unbedingt deine persönliche Realität. Ein Bankkonto fühlt sich sicher an, kann aber real Kaufkraft verlieren. Bitcoin ist für viele Menschen der Versuch, Wert langfristig zu speichern. Bitcoin kann als Werttransport über Zeit und Raum verstanden werden. Zentrale Sätze aus der Folge

„Das System hat sich verändert, aber unser Denken nicht.“

„Zinsen sind das, was du bekommst. Inflation ist das, was du verlierst.“

„Inflation ist immer persönlich. Nicht das, was in der Statistik steht, sondern das, was bei dir im Alltag passiert.“

„Wir verwechseln Stabilität mit Sicherheit.“

„Bitcoin ist kein schneller Gewinn. Es ist eine Möglichkeit, Wert zu bewahren – über Generationen hinweg.“

Vor-Ort Kurs Hinweis: Am 30.05.2026 findet mein Vor-Ort-Kurs statt: Bitcoin für Einsteiger – digitales Geld für analog Geborene Für alle, die Bitcoin ruhig, verständlich und ohne Fachchinesisch verstehen möchten. Link: https://bitucation.com/kurs/vor-ort-bitcoin-fuer-einsteiger-digitales-geld-fuer-analog-geborene/

Ausblick

In der nächsten Folge geht es darum, warum der Staat dieses Geldsystem sogar braucht – und warum sich daran so schnell nichts ändern wird.

]]>

item.title: Thank God for Bitcoin – To The Unknown Pod Episode 42: Bitcoin and A World At War
item.description:
In this episode, Jordan Bush and Ryan Finlay explore the complex intersections of global conflict, economic warfare, and Bitcoin's role as a resilient alternative in a world at war. They analyze recent Middle East tensions, the decline of the petrodollar, and how Bitcoin offers a form of financial sovereignty amidst geopolitical chaos.

]]>

item.title: 21Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast – Aus der Banken IT in die Welt von Bitcoin - Harald Betz
item.description:
Folge #61 – Ein Gespräch über Banken IT und Bitcoin Bücher

Harald Beetz ist seit fast 20 Jahren selbstständig in der Beratung für Banken und Rechenzentren. Angefangen als Banklehrling bei der Sparkasse, hat er früh den Wandel von Beratung hin zu reinem Vertrieb erlebt und sich auf IT-Projekte spezialisiert. In diesem Gespräch erzählt er, wie er von der Banken IT zu Bitcoin kam, warum er mit seiner Frau einen Roman über Geld schrieb und wie er sich heute zwischen Beratung und Content rund um Bitcoin positioniert.


Du erfährst,

  • wie Harald die Bankenwelt von innen erlebt hat,
  • welche Herausforderungen und Chancen es als IT-Berater gibt,
  • warum er Bitcoin zunächst wieder verkaufte und später mit völlig anderem Blick neu entdeckte,
  • wie aus einer Buchidee seiner Frau ein gemeinsames Projekt wurde
  • und welche unternehmerischen Lektionen er aus fast zwei Jahrzehnten Selbstständigkeit mitnimmt.


Kapitel:

  • 00:00 Begrüßung und Vorstellung
  • 02:15 Vom Banklehrling zum IT-Berater
  • 07:40 Veränderungen in der Bankenwelt seit den 2000er Jahren
  • 15:10 Einstieg in die Selbstständigkeit und erste Projekte
  • 22:05 Gescheiterte Produktidee und der Wechsel zur Beratung
  • 29:15 Erster Kontakt mit Bitcoin und die zweite Begegnung
  • 36:50 Der Roman über Geld und Bitcoin
  • 44:20 Zukunft der Beratung im Banken- und Bitcoin-Umfeld
  • 49:00 Wichtigste Tipps für Vertrieb und Resilienz


Links:

Youtube: youtube.com/@MiesesGeld

Webseite: miesesgeld.de

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/haraldbetz


---

21 Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast

Hallo, mein Name ist Daniel Wingen und ich suche den Austausch mit anderen Unternehmern die in Bitcoin eine wichtiges Werkzeug für ihr Unternehmen sehen. Ich möchte selbst lernen und andere dazu inspirieren sich mit Bitcoin im eigenen Unternehmen zu beschäftigen.

Hier kannst Du Teil der Community werden und mich kontaktieren:

Telegram Community: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠t.me/B21Focus⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ 

Daniel auf X: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠x.com/danielwingen⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ 

Daniel auf LinkedIn:⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ linkedin.com/in/danielwingen/⁠

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Interviews – Is Anonymity Really Dead in Crypto? | Concordium CEO Explains
item.description: <![CDATA[Is anonymity in crypto really coming to an end?In this episode, Alex Richardson sits down with Boris Bohrer-Bilowitzki, CEO of Concordium, to unpack one of the biggest shifts happening in blockchain today—where privacy, identity, and regulation collide.While much of the industry is still focused on hype cycles and memecoins, this conversation goes deeper into what it actually takes for crypto to reach mainstream, real-world adoption.We explore why institutions remain cautious, what’s missing from today’s Layer 1 blockchains, and how new approaches—like identity at the protocol level and zero-knowledge proofs—could reshape the future of digital finance.In this episode, you’ll learn:- Why anonymity may not work for large-scale adoption- The real role of privacy in a regulated world- How identity can unlock institutional use cases- What most blockchains are getting wrong today- Why the next few years could redefine the entire crypto landscapeBoris shares a clear perspective:For crypto to move forward, it needs to work within real-world systems—not outside them.This isn’t about removing privacy—it’s about building it the right way.Guest & LinksConcordium: https://www.concordium.com/X (Twitter): https://x.com/Concordium]]>

item.title: Kryptohelden - Bitcoin, Ethereum & Co meistern - ohne Hektik! – Aufbau eines Web3-Startups: Erkenntnisse vom Gründer von Li.fi mit Philipp Zentner
item.description:
Inhalt
  • Vorstellung von Philipp Zentner und Li.fi
  • Unterschiede zwischen Web2 und Web3 und Anpassung von Geschäftsmodellen an das Web3-Ökosystem
  • Identifizierung von Nischen und Marktbedürfnissen in Web3 im Vergleich zu Web2
  • Aufbau eines starken Teams und Unterschiede bei der Suche und Bindung von Talenten in Web2 und Web3
  • Schaffung einer kollaborativen und innovativen Unternehmenskultur
  • Finanzierung eines Web3-Startups und Unterschiede bei der Finanzierung zwischen Web2 und Web3
  • Tokenomics und regulatorische Überlegungen im Web3-Umfeld
  • Erfahrungen und Herausforderungen beim Marketing und Community-Aufbau von Li.fi
  • Erkenntnisse und Tipps für diejenigen, die ihre eigenen Web3-Unternehmen gründen möchten
  • Zusammenfassung der wichtigsten Punkte und kommende Meilensteine für Li.fi
  • Abschließende Gedanken und Worte der Ermutigung für das Publikum.

Weiterführende Links

  • https://jumper.exchange/

  • https://li.fi/

item.title: BTC-ECHO Recap | Top-Stories zu Bitcoin & Kryptowährungen – Wir sind umgezogen!
Der Relai Bitcoin Podcast – Warum Bitcoin mehr als nur Geld ist, mit Markus Huersch | Relai Bitcoin Podcast #120
item.description:
Markus Huersch ist der Autor des Buches “21 good reasons, weil Bitcoin viel mehr ist als nur Geld” und begeisterter Bitcoiner. Der Grund fürs Buch ist schon mehr als 20 Jahre alt, als Markus in seiner früheren Tätigkeit Interviews und Dokumentationen überall auf der Welt plante. 

Im Gespräch mit Relais Joël Kai Lenz erzählt Markus von seiner Erfahrung in der Filmbranche, wie er zu Bitcoin kam, weshalb er schon immer mit dem Auto nach Südafrika wollte und wie er das verbunden hat, um ein Bitcoin-Buch zu schreiben. 

Du findest Markus’ Buch hier: https://21goodreasons.com/ 

Und schreibe ihn an, falls du Fragen hast: https://markushuersch.com/ 

—

⏱ Kapitel:

00:00 - Intro und Vorstellung

01:59 - Wie Markus mit der Idee des Buches aufkam

07:19 - Was bedeutet Bitcoin für Markus heute? 

09:15 - Bitcoin in Afrika, wie es Markus erlebt hat

13:00 - Werbepause für die Relai-App und Dienste

18:11 - Wie Markus seine Buchmomente nochmals durchlebt

21:00 - Was interessiert Markus heute in der Bitcoin Welt?

24:10 - Sehen wir dann auch bald schon einen 21 good reasons Film?

28:05 - Was kann Relai in der Bitcoin Bildung noch besser machen?

30:20 - Orangepillt Markus noch heute Leute oder lässt er es lieber sein?

33:16 - Markus’ Bitcoin-Position in seinem Portfolio

—

Willst du dir die Sendung lieber anhören? 

🎧Auf Apple Podcast anhören: 

https://podcasts.apple.com/at/podcast/der-relai-bitcoin-podcast/id1543240691 

🎧Auf Spotify anhören: 

https://open.spotify.com/show/4nwQa2HLv2d9GHnGm6GpoO?si=2bd070927706437d 

—

Die in der Sendung geäusserten Meinungen sind die Meinungen der einzelnen Gäste und geben nicht unbedingt die Meinung der Relai AG wieder. Die Informationen im Podcast können ohne Vorankündigung geändert werden, und es wird nicht garantiert, dass sie richtig, vollständig oder aktuell sind.

—

🎓 Lerne Bitcoin besser kennen:

🧠 Kostenloser Bitcoin-Kurs: https://relai.app/de/21-bitcoin-basics/

📥 Kostenloser wöchentlicher Bitcoin-Newsletter: https://relai.app/de/newsletter

👀 Brauchst du Hilfe? Stell uns eine Frage: https://support.relai.app/de

Folge uns:

Instagram: https://instagram.com/relai.app

Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/relai_app

LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/relai

Haftungsausschluss: Relai ist gemäss dem MiCA-Regulierungsrahmen berechtigt, Krypto-Asset-Dienstleistungen in der Schweiz und in der gesamten Europäischen Union anzubieten. Nach Abschluss der Passporting-Verfahren baut das Unternehmen seine Dienstleistungen aktiv auf weitere EU-Mitgliedstaaten aus.

#Bitcoin #Finanzen #Investieren #RelaiApp #SwissBitcoin #StackSats #21BitcoinBasics #BitcoinWissen

]]>

item.title: Epicenter - Learn about Crypto, Blockchain, Ethereum, Bitcoin and Distributed Technologies – Why Only 3 Builders Control All of Ethereum
item.description:
In this episode, host Friederike Ernst is joined by Kubi Mensah, CEO and co-founder of Gattaca, the company behind Titan Builder. Kubi sheds light on the highly competitive and often opaque world of Ethereum block building, explaining how Gattaca evolved from a centralized exchange proprietary trading firm to one of the three dominant builders responsible for constructing the vast majority of Ethereum blocks today .
 



 
They dissect the true "journey of a transaction," revealing why over half of all Ethereum transaction value bypasses the public mempool in favor of private order flow auctions and MEV-protection services . Kubi explains the intricate mechanics of top-of-block bidding by high-frequency DeFi arbitrageurs, the necessity of extreme latency optimization, and the "flywheel effect" that makes block building a natural oligopoly . Finally, the discussion turns to the future of the Ethereum roadmap, unpacking how upcoming upgrades like ePBS (enshrined Proposer-Builder Separation) and FOCIL (Fork-Choice Enforced Inclusion Lists) aim to permanently alter the power dynamics between block builders, validators, and originators .
 
 
Topics


  • 04:15 Transitioning from TradFi Trading to Ethereum Block Building
  • 09:30 Redefining the Builder: Relays and Order Flow Auctions
  • 15:00 Unpacking the Mempool: Public vs. Private Transactions
  • 21:45 The Anatomy of a Block & "Top-of-Block" Arbitrage
  • 27:10 How Builders Pay Proposers to Win Auctions
  • 35:20 The Oligopoly: Why Only 3 Builders Dominate Ethereum
  • 42:15 Trust in the Dark Forest: Handling Searcher Bundles
  • 49:00 The Convergence of Builders and Solvers
  • 55:30 The Impact of ePBS, FOCIL, and Pre-confirmations




Sponsors:



Lido V3 introduces stVaults: a modular staking infrastructure that lets builders and institutions deploy custom staking vaults, while staying anchored to stETH as a shared liquidity layer.Get started building with Lido V3 today: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenterBlock Space Forum: https://blockspace.forum/

]]>
